name: OrchestrAgent — Plan Executor
description: Receives a project plan via webhook, bootstraps workspace + SQLite state, runs each step through run-step.sh (executor → reviewer retry loop), then applies 3D scoring (objective + review + policy) as the final pass gate before advancing. Pings Telegram on start, on any blocked step (with score breakdown), and on final success.

parameters.text: =🛑 OrchestrAgent stopped — project {{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }} blocked at step {{ $json.step_no }} attempts: {{ $json.attempts }} · score: {{ $json.score }} · cost: ${{ $json.cost_usd }} reason: {{ $json.block_reason }} objective {{ $json.objective_score }} · review {{ $json.review_score }} · policy {{ $json.policy_score }} · final {{ $json.final_score }}/100 critical issues: {{ $json.critical_issues }} · verdict: {{ $json.verdict }} Reports: workspace/{{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }}/step_{{ $json.step_no }}_executor.json workspace/{{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }}/step_{{ $json.step_no }}_reviewer.json Recovery: /oa-retry {{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }} {{ $json.step_no }} · /oa-skip {{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }} {{ $json.step_no }}
=✅ OrchestrAgent finished project {{ $('Prepare').item.json.project_id }} — all {{ $('Prepare').item.json.plan_length }} steps passed 3D review.
